prBodyNotes:
## Upgrading Talos

Follow the official documentation:
- [Upgrading Talos](https://docs.siderolabs.com/talos/v1.13/configure-your-talos-cluster/lifecycle-management/upgrading-talos)
- [Talos Image Factory](https://factory.talos.dev/) - select the new version and your extensions to obtain the image hash

```bash
talosctl upgrade --image factory.talos.dev/metal-installer/<hash>:{{newVersion}}
```

After the upgrade, update `talosVersion` in `config/versions.yaml` to `{{newVersion}}`.

## Upgrading Kubernetes

Check official versions on [kubernetes.io/releases](https://kubernetes.io/releases/).
Upgrade to the latest patch of each minor release **sequentially** - skipping minor versions is unsupported.

```bash
talosctl upgrade-k8s --to {{newVersion}}
```

After the upgrade, update `kubernetesVersion` in `config/versions.yaml` to `{{newVersion}}`.
